title: SpyInventories
description: Inventory management system designed for spycore
body:
# SpyInventories
### (Join [Discord](https://discord.gg/fzcGYV7E9Q) for any issue/query/suggestion)

**SpyInventories** is a lightweight cross-world inventory manager designed to work seamlessly with **SpyCore**. It allows you to group worlds together so players can share their items, health, and experience only where you want them to.

### 🎒 Smart Synchronization
Define "World Groups" in your config to link specific worlds. When a player moves between worlds in the same group, their data stays with them. If they move to a world outside that group, they get a fresh start.

### ✨ Key Features
- **Data Sync**: Synchronizes Inventories, Ender Chests, Health, Hunger, Potion Effects, and XP.
- **Asynchronous Saving**: All data is saved in the background to prevent server "tps drops" or lag spikes.
- **SpyCore Support**: Natively handles worlds organized in folders (containers) and aliased worlds.
- **Lightweight**: Minimal performance footprint, even with large player counts.

### 🛡️ Requirements & Compatibility
- **Dependency**: Requires [SpyCore](https://modrinth.com/plugin/spycore).
- **Loaders**: PaperMC (Recommended) & Spigot.
- **Version**: Minecraft 1.21.11.

---
*Developed by SpyGamingOG*
